summary: The diff implements REQ-13 by replacing the old PDF/print download with a 'Save as HTML' client-side export in useDownloadPDF.ts. The hook exports a downloadHTML function that builds a fully self-contained HTML file with inline styles, converts the profile photo blob URL to a base64 data URL via toDataUrl(), and triggers a programmatic anchor download of 'resume.html'. App.tsx is updated to call downloadHTML and label the button 'Save as HTML'. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.
